description: Install and configure Prettier. Create .prettierrc (singleQuote, semi, 2 spaces, 100 char width) and .prettierignore (build/, node_modules/, coverage/). Add format and format:check scripts to package.json. Verify pnpm format:check passes on all source files.
title: Add Prettier formatting

descriptionHistory.description: Install and configure Prettier. Create .prettierrc (singleQuote, semi, 2 spaces, 100 char width) and .prettierignore (build/, node_modules/, coverage/). Add format and format:check scripts to package.json. Verify pnpm format:check passes on all source files.
